infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Noop uses Bluetooth to keep your WHOOP strap synced in the background so sleep and recovery data are always up to date.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Noop uses Bluetooth to keep your WHOOP strap synced in the background so sleep and recovery data are always up to date.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Noop reads steps, workouts, heart rate, sleep, and other Apple Health data so it can blend Apple Watch and iPhone signals with your WHOOP recovery and strain.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Noop writes recovery, strain, sleep stages, and workout data back to Apple Health so other apps can use them.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Noop reads iPhone barometer and motion data to detect hill climbs, stair climbing, and other altitude-aware activities the WHOOP strap can't see.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Noop uses Bluetooth to keep your WHOOP strap synced in the background so sleep and recovery data are always up to date.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Noop reads steps, workouts, heart rate, sleep, and other Apple Health data so it can blend Apple Watch and iPhone signals with your WHOOP recovery and strain.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Noop writes recovery, strain, sleep stages, and workout data back to Apple Health so other apps can use them.
